# Edge Modular

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Containerized Data Centers, Edge and Micro Data Centers, Liquid Cooling
**Website:** https://edgemodular.com/

## Headline
Modular data center supplier for AI-ready, liquid-cooled, edge, and packaged infrastructure deployments.

## Overview
Edge Modular belongs in the market map because it is directly positioned around modular AI-ready infrastructure, including liquid-cooled and edge-oriented deployments. It is a good fit for buyers who want a packaged data-center-in-a-box style path without pretending every project needs a huge campus build.

## Key capabilities
- prefabricated and packaged data center systems
- AI-ready deployment framing
- edge and modular rollout support

## Best fit for
- buyers comparing modular pods versus traditional buildouts
- edge and distributed infrastructure planners
- teams needing a faster modular deployment path
